#  Procore Android App - Android Requirements 
#####  Important
The Procore Android App should only be installed from the Google Play™ store. Procore does not support issues arising from installations outside of Google Play™.   

The Procore Android app currently requires **Android 13 or later**. The current requirements are listed below. Earlier versions of Android stopped being supported in February 2026.
#### Updated Operating System Requirements for the Procore Android Mobile App
The minimum operating system requirements for the Procore App is **Android 13**.
To continue receiving automatic Procore Android app enhancements and bug fixes, your Android mobile device will need to be updated to at least Android 13, but we recommend updating your mobile device to the most recent version of Android for the best experience.
Most devices using the Procore app today already run a supported version of Android or are eligible to update to Android 13 at no cost. If your device cannot run Android 13, we recommend upgrading that device to ensure continued app support. 
#### What happens if my device is on an older Operating System?
If you already have Procore installed on your device, you can continue using it until one year after support was removed for that Android version. After that year, the app will no longer be accessible and you will be prompted to update your device before accessing the Procore App.
#### How do I update my device?
For steps on how to update your device to a later version of Android, see Google's support article on [checking and updating your Android version](https://support.google.com/android/answer/7680439?hl=en) .
## See Also
  * [What type of mobile device should I use for Procore?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-type-of-mobile-device-should-i-use-for-procore)
  * [What are the computer and mobile hardware requirements for Procore Models?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-the-computer-and-mobile-hardware-requirements-for-procore-models)
